## The prompt

<!-- Paste the exact prompt. Include the surrounding context — was the work finished, or still in progress? -->

## What happened

- [ ] The skill **activated** but I didn't want it to (I was mid-task / it was a mechanical session / I wanted a plain summary).
- [ ] The skill **did NOT activate** but I wanted to debrief and learn.

## What you expected

<!-- "I expected it to stay quiet because I was still wiring up the endpoint."
"I expected it to fire because I asked whether I actually understood the database choice."
"I expected it to bow out — we just renamed some files." -->

## Why

<!-- Optional but very useful. Which trigger fits? Which when-NOT-to-debrief clause covers it (mid-task / mechanical / wanted-a-recap)? -->
